evals.expected_output: An array of documents with id, filename, summary, content_type, quality_score, and previews. Sorted by relevance.
assertions: search_documents is called with query='reinforcement learning' and a sensible limit (5-20)
Returned documents include id, filename, and summary
Results appear sorted by relevance (the most relevant doc is first)

evals.prompt: Find documents related to a specific document_id via similarity edges.
evals.expected_output: An array of related documents discovered through graph edges (similar-to / cites / references), with edge metadata.
assertions: find_related_documents is called with a real document_id (obtained from a prior search_documents call, not invented)
max_hops defaults to 1 unless the user asked for downstream traversal
Returned items expose the relationship type (similar-to / cites / references / mentions / etc.)

evals.prompt: Read the full text of one cited document.
evals.expected_output: The full extracted text of the document.
assertions: get_document_text is called only after a search and only on documents we intend to cite
The document_id passed is one returned by a prior search_documents or find_related_documents call
The full text is used to extract the verbatim quote shown in the answer
